business.name: Atlanta handyman company
business.tagline: Fix It Right, Fix It Fast

hero.headline: One call fixes it all — *Atlanta's handyman crew*
hero.subheadline: From deck repairs to HVAC fixes, we show up on time and get it done right.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every repair, every project
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to full projects — we handle what needs doing

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Drywall patches, door adjustments, squeaky floors, and all the fixes that pile up around the house.

services.title: Deck & Outdoor Work
services.description: Deck resurfacing, railing replacement, and outdoor maintenance that stands up to Georgia weather.

services.title: HVAC Service
services.description: Quick HVAC repairs to keep your system running when Atlanta heat hits hardest.

services.title: Commercial Building Maintenance
services.description: Fast commercial repairs that keep your business running without the downtime.

about.heading: Atlanta handymen who show up
about.body: We're the Atlanta team that answers the phone and gets to work. Real solutions, fair pricing, no runaround.

reviews.name: Matt
reviews.text: Outstanding experience with this handyman company. Top-tier craftsmanship, clear communication, and real attention to detail.

reviews.name: Ahmad C.
reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant experience. Thanks for finishing up so quickly.

reviews.name: Buckhead F.
reviews.text: Fixed our HVAC issue quickly at our commercial building. Showed up on time, explained the problem, fair price and easy to work with.

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Free quotes on every job. Call now or send us the details — we'll get back to you fast.
